project.name: Compile-Clean Fixture
project.description: Jawata-owned fixture that genuinely compiles against the JRE alone (no third-party dependencies, no duplicate types). Unlike simple-maven — an AST-analysis corpus full of deliberately-unresolvable targets (Lombok, JetBrains, duplicate types) — this project is the non-vacuous baseline for compile_workspace / get_diagnostics: a real FULL_BUILD emits ZERO problem markers on it, and a broken file dropped into a source root emits a REAL compiler error (Sprint 22a P0-a).
